RELICCHOICE-BRONZE_TICKET.title: Bronze Ticket
RELICCHOICE-BRONZE_TICKET.flavor: A relic that shifts to match the one who holds it.
RELICCHOICE-BRONZE_TICKET.description: Upon pickup, gain a relic based on your class: [red]Red Skull[/red], [green]Snecko Skull[/green], [purple]Bone Flute[/purple], [orange]Fencing Manual[/orange], or [blue]Data Disk[/blue].
RELICCHOICE-SILVER_TICKET.title: Silver Ticket
